headline: CONFIRMATION. Live baseline is composite 25 (Developing, scores 2.0-2.3 across dimensions; user-provided baseline of 35.5 diverges from live data — using live per assessor protocol). In-window evidence: Amnesty International April 2026 World Report documents US clampdown on migrants with unnecessary force, racial profiling, arbitrary detention, practices amounting to torture and enforced disappearance; HRW Feb 2026 documented Operation Metro Surge unlawful deaths of Renee Good and Alex Pretti by federal agents in Minnesota; AI labor crisis (92K+ tech workers laid off in 2026); Illinois SB3261/SB3444 AI liability legislation in limbo. Composite 25 already deeply reflects accumulated negative evidence at federal-policy level. No 5pt-threshold-crossing acute event. Composite holds. DATA INTEGRITY FLAG: User-input baseline (35.5) diverges from live (25.0) — reconciliation needed.
data_integrity_flag: User-input baseline 35.5 diverges from live data 25.0. Used live per assessor protocol.
